brand_positioning: Premium Outbound GTM strategy and execution. Hyper-personalized outbound that books meetings. High-trust, authority-driven, McKinsey/BCG meets modern SaaS.

global_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN completely. Do not use bg-gradient anywhere.
global_rules.shadows: FORBIDDEN. Use 1px solid borders (border-gray-200) instead to separate cards and elements.
global_rules.border_radius: Sharp geometry. Use rounded-none or maximum rounded-sm for subtle softening. No pill-shaped buttons unless explicitly styled as tags.
global_rules.whitespace: HEAVY. Use 2-3x more spacing than usual. p-12, p-16, py-24, py-32 for sections.
global_rules.icons: Use lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5, clean line icons only).
global_rules.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

typography.heading_font: Cabinet Grotesk, General Sans, or Inter (if Inter is used, MUST apply tracking-tighter and font-semibold to font-bold)

scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#1f3a5f]

motion_and_interaction.general: Subtle, restrained, no bouncy animations. Gentle fade-ins (opacity 0 to 1) and slow upward translations (translate-y-4 to 0).
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hover should trigger background color shifts or border color shifts (e.g., border-gray-200 to border-[#1f3a5f]). Do not use transform scaling (no scale-105) as it breaks the editorial rigid feel.

components.button_primary: bg-[#1f3a5f] text-white hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors border border-transparent rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1f3a5f] border border-[#1f3a5f] hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.button_accent: bg-white border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#1f3a5f] hover:bg-[#f8f9fa] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200. Logo lockup 'POLARIS / ORIGIN' with small lucide Compass or Star icon.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: High whitespace, left-aligned or asymmetric. H1: 'Hyper-personalized outbound that books meetings — you only pay for show-ups.' Subtitle. Two CTAs. Background is white, perhaps a subtle geometric image on the right or top-right.

sections.name: Trusted By Strip
sections.layout: Horizontal row of logos (use lucide icons as placeholders if needed, e.g., Building, Landmark), separated by vertical 1px borders.

sections.name: Problem / Model Explanation
sections.layout: Grid layout (1 col md: 2 col). Sharp contrast. Explain the 'Pay-Per-Show-Up' model. Use dark navy background (#1f3a5f) section with white text and gold accent borders.

sections.name: How It Works (Process)
sections.layout: Step-by-step editorial list. 1px horizontal borders separating steps. Large numbers (01, 02, 03) in gold or light gray.

sections.name: Featured Case Study Teaser
sections.layout: Large 2-column card. Image on one side, metrics on the other. Button: 'Read the full story'.

sections.name: Final CTA
sections.layout: Centered block, high padding (py-32). bg-[#f8f9fa] border-t border-slate-200.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Large typographic header: 'Systematic Growth. Engineered for Enterprise.' No image, pure typography and whitespace.

sections.name: Service Pillars
sections.layout: Bento grid or 4-column layout with 1px borders. Pillars: ICP & Offer Design, Hyper-Personalized Outbound, Multi-Channel Sequencing, Meeting Show-Up Guarantee.

sections.name: Methodology & Deliverables
sections.layout: List view, detailed text, editorial formatting. Use a sidebar navigation if needed.

sections.name: Header & Filter
sections.layout: Simple header. Text links for filtering by industry (e.g., SaaS, Finance, Logistics).

sections.name: Grid
sections.layout: Grid of cards. Each card has a border, a stark metric in large typography (e.g., '+140% ARR'), and a brief description. B&W imagery inside cards.

sections.name: Hero / Mission
sections.layout: Massive text. The North Star metaphor. 'Clarity in complex growth systems.'

sections.name: Leadership / Principles
sections.layout: 2-column layout. Black and white portraits. Stark lines.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Typographic header: 'Build the engine.' Culture and operating principles listed.

sections.name: Open Roles
sections.layout: Accordion or list view. Title, Location, Department. Border bottom for each row.

sections.name: Header & Split Layout
sections.layout: 2-column layout. Left: 'What to expect' panel (timeline, no-BS policy, qualification criteria). Right: The Form.

sections.name: Form
sections.layout: Use generic HTML inputs styled with Tailwind (border-b-only inputs, no fully boxed inputs for that editorial feel, or 1px border boxed inputs). Fields: Name, Work Email, Company, Role, Monthly Rev Range, ICP, Message. Submit button: navy, full width. Include 'data-testid' on inputs and button.
